CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cards_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `cards` BEGIN INSERT INTO `cards_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `dm_notes`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`dm_notes`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cards_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `cards` BEGIN INSERT INTO `cards_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `dm_notes`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`dm_notes`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `dm_notes` TEXT, content=`cards`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `sessionId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `question` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `probability` TEXT NOT NULL, `chaosFactor` INTEGER NOT NULL, `roll` INTEGER NOT NULL, `result` TEXT NOT NULL, `isRandomEvent` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `eventAction` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `eventSubject` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `sceneNumber` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`sessionId`) REFERENCES `mythic_sessions`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: idx_mythic_rolls_session
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_mythic_rolls_session` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sessionId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `uri` TEXT NOT NULL, `gameSystem` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'General', `fileName` TEXT NOT NULL, `fileSize` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastOpened` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `manualId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pageIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `label` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`manualId`) REFERENCES `manuals`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_manual_bookmarks_manualId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_manual_bookmarks_manualId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`manualId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `sessionId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `isCompleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sortOrder` INTEGER NOT NULL, `linkedTableId` INTEGER, `linkedDeckId` INTEGER, `imagePath` TEXT, `isAlternative` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`sessionId`) REFERENCES `sessions`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_scenes_sessionId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_scenes_sessionId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sessionId`)
